title: Macchiole Custom Car Air Vent Clip with Your Photo and Text,Personalised Different Scents Car Air Fresheners,Interior Decoration,Decorative Accessories
features: CUSTOMISATION: Simply click 'Customise Now' to create your own favored car air vent clip. Note: Please do not upload images that include copyrighted content.

MATERIAL: Our crystal car air vent clips are crafted from high-density ccetyolite-glass, which are lightweight and convenient to use. Each clip is carefully packaged in a special gift box when you get it.

VERSATILE USING: Hang the air vent clip in your car for a delightful companion on your journeys, bringing a touch of joy to your driving experience. It can also be hung anywhere else you desire, adding a personalised touch to your surroundings.

EASY INSTALLATION: The car air vent clips are easy to use as they perfectly fit the air conditioning vent grille bar on almost any type of cars.Hold two sides of the clip then gently pull it out from the vent when you don't need it.

UNIQUE GIFT: Custom car air vent clip is a great choice when you want to give someone an unique gift. You can design the air vent clip with the photo and text you want and choose a type of scent to make the clip even more lovely.
